content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Market is mixed with defensive rotation into FMCG/Pharma and strong momentum in Power cluster. India VIX at 18.4 signals elevated risk. Book is already 79% deployed with minimal remaining capacity (only INR 14k free), so priority is position management over new entries. MAHABANK position is down 4.7% near SL threshold and needs stop-loss discipline.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24135,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry at 81.50, CMP 77.71 (-4.7%). Q4 results were strong (PAT +35%, GNPA 1.45%) with analyst TPs Rs 88-90. Thesis intact but we bought near the 52-wk high of 77 and took an immediate drawdown. Setting SL at 74.50 (just below recent swing low ~72.31) to avoid getting chopped out, target 88 aligns with analyst consensus. Risk ~4% from CMP, reward ~13%, RR ~1:3."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up 10.5% today on strong Q4 (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%) with analyst TP Rs 1,143. Trailing SL to 955 (below today's low 981 gives too tight — using 955 just below recent 20-SMA breakout). Target 1100 captures move toward 52wk high 1141. RR ~1:3.3."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold ETF hedge position. Gold has cooled ~16% from highs but INR weakness and geopolitical tensions keep bid intact. SL at 119 (below recent swing low), target 135 (toward 52wk high zone)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1605.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up 3.2% on entry. Breaking to new 52wk highs on power theme + Nabha acquisition cleared. Trailing SL to 1605 (just below today's low 1645 with buffer, and near recent breakout zone). Target 1820 (analyst TPs Rs 2000-2300 but near-term first target). RR ~1:2.3."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "new_target": 1520.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Blowout Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +23%), fresh 52wk high. Entry at 1412.94, CMP flat. SL at 1360 (below today's low 1382 gives room), target 1520. FMCG defensive rotation underway. RR ~1:2."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1010.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Up 5.88% at fresh 52wk high. Q4 results April 27 is binary event but business update was strong (+25% advances, +22% deposits). SL at 1010 (just below recent breakout of 1011), target 1150. Exit before or right after Q4 if no beat confirmation. RR ~1:2.2."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 650.00,
      "new_target": 750.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52wk high today (685) on 3.7x volume. USFDA audit clean, Q4 results April 29, analyst TPs Rs 700-750. SL at 650 (below Bollinger upper band and recent breakout), target 750 (MOFSL TP). Exit before/after Q4 print. RR ~1:2."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2290.00,
      "new_target": 2550.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Entered near breakout. Q4 results April 30 is binary. SL at 2290 (below today's low 2336 with buffer, gives ~3.5% stop), target 2550 (analyst mid-range). FMCG defensive rotation. RR ~1:2."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "new_target": 435.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Base-on-base breakout, ESG upgrade, EDF nuclear MoU, 33rd year of dividends. SL at 388 (below recent swing low 387), target 435 (toward 52wk high 430 + extension). Q4 results May 15. RR ~1:2.1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 198.00,
      "new_target": 235.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "At all-time high, up 35% in April already. Shooting Star pattern on April 20 suggests near-term exhaustion risk. SL at 198 (below yesterday's close 200.83), target 235. Q4 results April 29. Tight management given extended move. RR ~1:2.3. Power cluster concentration noted — will not add more."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "reasoning": "Down 4.7% but thesis intact. Giving it room to recover with SL just below recent swing low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up after 10% gap-up to protect gains while keeping upside exposure."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. Maintain position."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1605.00,
      "reasoning": "52wk high breakout with strong volume. Lock in some gains."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "reasoning": "Post-Q4 beat momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1010.00,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52wk high. Consider reducing before Q4 on April 27 if extended."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 650.00,
      "reasoning": "52wk high with 3.7x volume. Hold into Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2290.00,
      "reasoning": "FMCG rotation play. Q4 April 30 is event risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "reasoning": "Base-on-base breakout intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 198.00,
      "reasoning": "Extended move, Shooting Star caution. Tighter management."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "DRREDDY, AUROPHARMA, CIPLA, WIPRO, INFY, HCLTECH, JIOFINL, DATAPATTNS, ELECON, DEEPAKNTR, PIRAMALFIN, ADANIENSOL, GAIL — all noted but no new entries today given 79% deployment. ELECON +18% on soft Q4 (PAT -96%) looks like exhaustion, avoid chasing. DEEPAKNTR gap-up on weak volume (0.5x) is suspect. PIRAMALFIN +13% gap-up after director resignation is a red flag — skip. WIPRO buyback arb interesting but limited edge. AUROPHARMA buyback closes April 29 — no window for fresh entry now. Watch for any position exit to free capital for these setups.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed — at the cap. No new positions possible until something exits. Power cluster exposure: TORNTPOWER (~6%) + ADANIPOWER (~5%) + NTPC (~5%) = ~16% of capital, below 20% cluster threshold but close. Will NOT add ADANIENSOL or any new power name. Multiple binary earnings events next week (AUBANK Apr 27, GRANULES Apr 29, ADANIPOWER Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30) — if any disappoint, need to be ready to exit fast. MAHABANK is the weakest position (-4.7%); if SL hit at 74.50 that frees ~INR 89k which can redeploy into a higher-conviction setup. Priority now: risk management, not accumulation."
}
